code: import{SET_ORDERS,SET_PRODUCTS,SET_USER_DATA,UPDATE_PRODUCT_LIST}from"./common";export var actionOrders=function actionOrders(orders){return{type:SET_ORDERS,payload:orders};};export var actionProducts=function actionProducts(products){return{type:SET_PRODUCTS,payload:products};};export var actionUpdateProductList=function actionUpdateProductList(productList){return{type:UPDATE_PRODUCT_LIST,productList:productList};};export var actionUserData=function actionUserData(userData){return{type:SET_USER_DATA,payload:userData};};
